title: FirmSem: Auditing Security-Guard Survival in Compiler-Optimized Release Binaries
description: Reproducibility artifact for obligation-conditioned verification of security-guard survival in compiler-optimized release binaries. It includes GuardIR, independently adjudicated benchmarks, deterministic and learned baselines, frozen semantic-model transcripts, and executable GCC/Clang security replays.
notes: Project code is Apache-2.0; project-authored metadata, annotations, documentation, and figures are CC BY 4.0; third-party excerpts retain upstream terms.
